title: CAT Financial Products Selects Broadridge for International Post-Trade Processing of Structured Products
text: NEW YORK and LONDON and ZURICH , April 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- CAT Financial Products Ltd. (CATFP), one of the leading independent Swiss providers of securities and investment services for structured products, has transformed its front to back office processing efficiency by implementing the international multi-asset post-trade processing solution from global Fintech leader Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE:BR).

title: Broadridge and Linedata Announce Integration with Linedata Longview OMS to enhance Trade Matching
text: Driving greater customer value through a single multi-asset class post-trade matching platform, leveraging FIX NEW YORK , April 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- To better automate the middle and back-office functions around trade matching, global Fintech leader, Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: BR), today announced an expansion of its partnership with Linedata, a global provider of asset management and credit technology data and services. Through this expanded global partnership, Broadridge's NYFIX Matching solution will be integrated directly with Linedata's Order Management System (OMS) powered by its Asset Management Platform (AMP).

title: Broadridge Schedules Webcast and Conference Call to Review Third Quarter Fiscal Year 2023 Results on May 2, 2023
text: NEW YORK , April 18, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE:BR) is scheduled to release its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2023 on Tuesday, May 2, 2023. Broadridge will host a webcast and conference call to discuss those results at 8:30 a.m.

title: UBS Executes First Cross-Border Intraday Repo Trade on Broadridge Distributed Ledger Repo Platform
text: NEW YORK , April 3, 2023  /PRNewswire/ -- Global Fintech leader Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE:BR), today announced that UBS (NYSE:UBS) and a global Asian bank have successfully executed the first cross-border intraday repo transaction on Broadridge's blockchain enabled Distributed Ledger Repo (DLR) platform. This groundbreaking intraday trade marks the launch of the next phase in the rollout of Broadridge's DLR platform.
